description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a prominent red gable roof and a modern, boxy facade. The front elevation showcases a balcony with a white railing above a covered porch, flanked by large windows and stone-textured wall sections. The ground floor includes multiple windows and a recessed entryway, while the upper floor has a central balcony and additional windows, some with shutters. The side and rear views reveal a simpler, solid white exterior with minimal window openings and a continuous roofline. The roof is composed of interlocking panels with a slight overhang, providing both aesthetic appeal and functional weather protection. The overall design blends contemporary and traditional elements, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a red gable roof, stone-textured accents, a front balcony, and large windows. The facade combines contemporary and traditional design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the balcony, covered porch, stone-textured walls, and multiple large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended red gable roof and plain white wall with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a simple white wall with the full span of the red gable roof and no visible windows or doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the red gable roof and plain white wall, mirroring the other side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some shutters
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryway beneath a covered porch, with balcony above and stone-textured columns
